name: lpm-bun-large-fixture
_comment: Phase 49 F2 bench fixture. 21 direct deps → ~266 transitive packages — the 'webpack-adjacent mix' the Phase 49 ship gate anchors on. Pinned at commit time so future perf phases can reproduce against a fixed artifact rather than rebuilding from memory. See DOCS/new-features/37-rust-client-RUNNER-VISION-phase49-streaming-resolver-preplan.md §10.1 for the bench methodology.
